Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

    The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed.
    Activity.Builder

    Activity.Builder

    Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity
    Activity.Builder

    roundingAdjustment(ActivityRoundingAdjustment roundingAdjustment)
    Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record
    Activity.Builder
    roundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)
    Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record
    Activity.Builder
    roundingAmount(RoundingAmount roundingAmount)
    the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry
    Activity.Builder
    roundingAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAmount> roundingAmount)
    the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry
    Activity.Builder
    roundingReason(String roundingReason)
    Free form text field providing reason for rounding
    Activity.Builder
    roundingReason(Optional<String> roundingReason)
    Free form text field providing reason for rounding
    Activity.Builder

    Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split
    Activity.Builder

    Activity.Builder

    Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location
    Activity.Builder
    withdrawalPendingReview(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWithdrawalPendingReview> withdrawalPendingReview)
    Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location
    Activity.Builder
    withholding(ActivityWithholding withholding)
    Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding
    Activity.Builder
    withholding(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWithholding> withholding)
    Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding
    Activity.Builder
    withholdings(List<Withholding> withholdings)
    Any withholdings associated with the activity
    Activity.Builder
    withholdings(Optional<? extends List<Withholding>> withholdings)
    Any withholdings associated with the activity
    Activity.Builder
    worthless(ActivityWorthless worthless)
    Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event
    Activity.Builder
    worthless(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWorthless> worthless)
    Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • acatsPendingOut

      public Activity.Builder acatsPendingOut(ActivityAcatsPendingOut acatsPendingOut)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

    • acatsPendingOut

      public Activity.Builder acatsPendingOut(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityAcatsPendingOut> acatsPendingOut)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

    • accountId

      public Activity.Builder accountId(String accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountId

      public Activity.Builder accountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountMemo

      public Activity.Builder accountMemo(ActivityAccountMemo accountMemo)
      Indicates the memo location impacted by an entry

    • accountMemo

      public Activity.Builder accountMemo(Optional<? extends ActivityAccountMemo> accountMemo)
      Indicates the memo location impacted by an entry

    • accountTransfer

      public Activity.Builder accountTransfer(ActivityAccountTransfer accountTransfer)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    • accountTransfer

      public Activity.Builder accountTransfer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityAccountTransfer> accountTransfer)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    • accruedInterest

      public Activity.Builder accruedInterest(List<AccruedInterest> accruedInterest)
      Any accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the activity

    • accruedInterest

      public Activity.Builder accruedInterest(Optional<? extends List<AccruedInterest>> accruedInterest)
      Any accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the activity

    • accruedInterestDesc

      public Activity.Builder accruedInterestDesc(AccruedInterestDesc accruedInterestDesc)
      Used to record the amount of interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • accruedInterestDesc

      public Activity.Builder accruedInterestDesc(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AccruedInterestDesc> accruedInterestDesc)
      Used to record the amount of interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • activityDate

      public Activity.Builder activityDate(ActivityActivityDate activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityDate

      public Activity.Builder activityDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityActivityDate> activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityDescription

      public Activity.Builder activityDescription(String activityDescription)
      The description for an activity. This may include special instructions, symbol description, etc when relavant

    • activityDescription

      public Activity.Builder activityDescription(Optional<String> activityDescription)
      The description for an activity. This may include special instructions, symbol description, etc when relavant

    • activityId

      public Activity.Builder activityId(String activityId)
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityId

      public Activity.Builder activityId(Optional<String> activityId)
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityTime

      public Activity.Builder activityTime(OffsetDateTime activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

    • activityTime

      public Activity.Builder activityTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

      public Activity.Builder allocation(ActivityAllocation allocation)
      Object containing metadata for trade allocation

    • allocation

      public Activity.Builder allocation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityAllocation> allocation)

    • assetDescription

      public Activity.Builder assetDescription(String assetDescription)
      Name of the issuer of a security and additional descriptive information about the particular issue

    • assetDescription

      public Activity.Builder assetDescription(Optional<String> assetDescription)
      Name of the issuer of a security and additional descriptive information about the particular issue

    • assetId

      public Activity.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Not populated on a currency only movement

    • assetId

      public Activity.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Not populated on a currency only movement

      public Activity.Builder bondDefault(ActivityBondDefault bondDefault)
      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • bondDefault

      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • capitalGains

      public Activity.Builder capitalGains(ActivityCapitalGains capitalGains)
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • capitalGains

      public Activity.Builder capitalGains(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityCapitalGains> capitalGains)
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • cashDividend

      public Activity.Builder cashDividend(ActivityCashDividend cashDividend)
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashDividend

      public Activity.Builder cashDividend(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityCashDividend> cashDividend)
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashInLieu

      public Activity.Builder cashInLieu(ActivityCashInLieu cashInLieu)
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • cashInLieu

      public Activity.Builder cashInLieu(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityCashInLieu> cashInLieu)
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • commission

      public Activity.Builder commission(ActivityCommission commission)
      Used to record commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • commission

      public Activity.Builder commission(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityCommission> commission)
      Used to record commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • commissions

      public Activity.Builder commissions(List<Commission> commissions)
      Any commissions associated with the activity

    • commissions

      public Activity.Builder commissions(Optional<? extends List<Commission>> commissions)
      Any commissions associated with the activity

    • conversion

      public Activity.Builder conversion(ActivityConversion conversion)
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

    • conversion

      public Activity.Builder conversion(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityConversion> conversion)
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

      public Activity.Builder corporateActionMemoAdjustment(ActivityCorporateActionMemoAdjustment corporateActionMemoAdjustment)

      public Activity.Builder creationTime(OffsetDateTime creationTime)

    • creationTime

      public Activity.Builder creationTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> creationTime)
      The date/time an activity was created in the ledger

    • credit

      public Activity.Builder credit(ActivityCredit credit)
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • credit

      public Activity.Builder credit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityCredit> credit)
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • currencyAssetId

      public Activity.Builder currencyAssetId(String currencyAssetId)
      Required if any currency field like `price, gross_amount, trade.markup, fee.amount` is provided. The currency's ascend asset_id

    • currencyAssetId

      public Activity.Builder currencyAssetId(Optional<String> currencyAssetId)
      Required if any currency field like `price, gross_amount, trade.markup, fee.amount` is provided. The currency's ascend asset_id

    • generation

      public Activity.Builder generation(String generation)
      For a given set of activity that are part of the same lineage the highest generation will be the most recent activity

    • generation

      public Activity.Builder generation(Optional<String> generation)
      For a given set of activity that are part of the same lineage the highest generation will be the most recent activity

    • grossAmount

      public Activity.Builder grossAmount(ActivityGrossAmount grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees, withholdings, accrued_interest, or commissions (First money)

    • grossAmount

      public Activity.Builder grossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees, withholdings, accrued_interest, or commissions (First money)

    • interest

      public Activity.Builder interest(ActivityInterest interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interest

      public Activity.Builder interest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityInterest> interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interestPayment

      public Activity.Builder interestPayment(ActivityInterestPayment interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • interestPayment

      public Activity.Builder interestPayment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityInterestPayment> interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • liquidation

      public Activity.Builder liquidation(ActivityLiquidation liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • liquidation

      public Activity.Builder liquidation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityLiquidation> liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • maturity

      public Activity.Builder maturity(ActivityMaturity maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • maturity

      public Activity.Builder maturity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityMaturity> maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • merger

      public Activity.Builder merger(ActivityMerger merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • merger

      public Activity.Builder merger(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityMerger> merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • name

      public Activity.Builder name(String name)
      accounts/{account_id}/activities/{activity_id}

    • name

      public Activity.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      accounts/{account_id}/activities/{activity_id}

    • nameChange

      public Activity.Builder nameChange(ActivityNameChange nameChange)
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    • nameChange

      public Activity.Builder nameChange(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityNameChange> nameChange)
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

      The monetary value of an activity, inclusive of fees, withholding, commisions, etc (Second Money)

    • nextActivityId

      public Activity.Builder nextActivityId(String nextActivityId)
      can be an empty string if there is no next activity is populated when there is a modification resulting in a new activity

    • nextActivityId

      public Activity.Builder nextActivityId(Optional<String> nextActivityId)
      can be an empty string if there is no next activity is populated when there is a modification resulting in a new activity

      public Activity.Builder nextActivityProcessDate(NextActivityProcessDate nextActivityProcessDate)
      the process date of the next activity(nil if the next_activity_id is an empty string)

      public Activity.Builder previousActivityId(String previousActivityId)
      When populated, the activity_id of that precedes this one

      When populated, the activity_id of that precedes this one

    • previousProcessDate

      public Activity.Builder previousProcessDate(PreviousProcessDate previousProcessDate)

    • price

      public Activity.Builder price(ActivityPrice price)
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Not populated on a currency only movement

    • price

      public Activity.Builder price(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityPrice> price)
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Not populated on a currency only movement

    • processDate

      public Activity.Builder processDate(ActivityProcessDate processDate)
      The date that the activity was booked to the ledger

    • processDate

      public Activity.Builder processDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityProcessDate> processDate)
      The date that the activity was booked to the ledger

    • quantity

      public Activity.Builder quantity(ActivityQuantity quantity)
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved for a given entry/activity Required if activity.state != PENDING

    • quantity

      public Activity.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityQuantity> quantity)
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved for a given entry/activity Required if activity.state != PENDING

    • redemptionFull

      public Activity.Builder redemptionFull(ActivityRedemptionFull redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionFull

      public Activity.Builder redemptionFull(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRedemptionFull> redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionPartial

      public Activity.Builder redemptionPartial(ActivityRedemptionPartial redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • redemptionPartial

      public Activity.Builder redemptionPartial(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRedemptionPartial> redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • regionCode

      public Activity.Builder regionCode(String regionCode)
      Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index

    • regionCode

      public Activity.Builder regionCode(Optional<String> regionCode)
      Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index

    • reverseStockSplit

      public Activity.Builder reverseStockSplit(ActivityReverseStockSplit reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • reverseStockSplit

      public Activity.Builder reverseStockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityReverseStockSplit> reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • rightsDistribution

      public Activity.Builder rightsDistribution(ActivityRightsDistribution rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsDistribution

      public Activity.Builder rightsDistribution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRightsDistribution> rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsSubscription

      public Activity.Builder rightsSubscription(ActivityRightsSubscription rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • rightsSubscription

      public Activity.Builder rightsSubscription(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRightsSubscription> rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • roundingAdjustment

      public Activity.Builder roundingAdjustment(ActivityRoundingAdjustment roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • roundingAdjustment

      public Activity.Builder roundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • roundingAmount

      public Activity.Builder roundingAmount(RoundingAmount roundingAmount)
      the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry

    • roundingAmount

      public Activity.Builder roundingAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAmount> roundingAmount)
      the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry

    • roundingReason

      public Activity.Builder roundingReason(String roundingReason)
      Free form text field providing reason for rounding

    • roundingReason

      public Activity.Builder roundingReason(Optional<String> roundingReason)
      Free form text field providing reason for rounding

    • saleOfRights

      public Activity.Builder saleOfRights(ActivitySaleOfRights saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • saleOfRights

      public Activity.Builder saleOfRights(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivitySaleOfRights> saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • settleDate

      public Activity.Builder settleDate(ActivitySettleDate settleDate)
      The date a given activity will officially settle

    • settleDate

      public Activity.Builder settleDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivitySettleDate> settleDate)
      The date a given activity will officially settle

    • side

      public Activity.Builder side(ActivitySide side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • side

      public Activity.Builder side(Optional<? extends ActivitySide> side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • sideModifier

      public Activity.Builder sideModifier(ActivitySideModifier sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position

    • sideModifier

      public Activity.Builder sideModifier(Optional<? extends ActivitySideModifier> sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position

    • spinoff

      public Activity.Builder spinoff(ActivitySpinoff spinoff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • spinoff

      public Activity.Builder spinoff(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivitySpinoff> spinoff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • state

      public Activity.Builder state(ActivityState state)
      The state of the activity

    • state

      public Activity.Builder state(Optional<? extends ActivityState> state)
      The state of the activity

    • stockDividend

      public Activity.Builder stockDividend(ActivityStockDividend stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockDividend

      public Activity.Builder stockDividend(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityStockDividend> stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockSplit

      public Activity.Builder stockSplit(ActivityStockSplit stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • stockSplit

      public Activity.Builder stockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityStockSplit> stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • subtypeCategory

      public Activity.Builder subtypeCategory(String subtypeCategory)
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/ activity

    • subtypeCategory

      public Activity.Builder subtypeCategory(Optional<String> subtypeCategory)
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/ activity

    • sweep

      public Activity.Builder sweep(ActivitySweep sweep)
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • sweep

      public Activity.Builder sweep(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivitySweep> sweep)
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • tenderOffer

      public Activity.Builder tenderOffer(ActivityTenderOffer tenderOffer)
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • tenderOffer

      public Activity.Builder tenderOffer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityTenderOffer> tenderOffer)
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • trade

      public Activity.Builder trade(ActivityTrade trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • trade

      public Activity.Builder trade(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityTrade> trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • transfer

      public Activity.Builder transfer(ActivityTransfer transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • transfer

      public Activity.Builder transfer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityTransfer> transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • type

      public Activity.Builder type(ActivityType type)
      The type of activity this is

    • type

      public Activity.Builder type(Optional<? extends ActivityType> type)
      The type of activity this is

    • unitSplit

      public Activity.Builder unitSplit(ActivityUnitSplit unitSplit)
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • unitSplit

      public Activity.Builder unitSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityUnitSplit> unitSplit)
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • warrantExercise

      public Activity.Builder warrantExercise(ActivityWarrantExercise warrantExercise)
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • warrantExercise

      public Activity.Builder warrantExercise(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWarrantExercise> warrantExercise)
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • withdrawal

      public Activity.Builder withdrawal(ActivityWithdrawal withdrawal)
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawal

      public Activity.Builder withdrawal(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWithdrawal> withdrawal)
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public Activity.Builder withdrawalPendingReview(ActivityWithdrawalPendingReview withdrawalPendingReview)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public Activity.Builder withdrawalPendingReview(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWithdrawalPendingReview> withdrawalPendingReview)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withholding

      public Activity.Builder withholding(ActivityWithholding withholding)
      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

      Any withholdings associated with the activity

      public Activity.Builder withholdings(Optional<? extends List<Withholding>> withholdings)
      Any withholdings associated with the activity

    • worthless

      public Activity.Builder worthless(ActivityWorthless worthless)
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    • worthless

      public Activity.Builder worthless(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityWorthless> worthless)
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    • build

      public Activity build()
